resources.string: Unexpected error occurred. Please try again.\nIf the problem persists, contact support.
No internet connection.\nPlease check your network and try again.
Request failed (Status code: %1$d).\nPlease try again later.

Service is currently unavailable
(Status code: %1$d).
Please try again later.
If the problem persists, contact support.
Robot indicating an unexpected error occurred
Enter at least 3 characters to find users and repositories.
